#05-02, Eightrium@Changi Business Park,

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
The unmistakable full-flavour of Nescafe Classic is what makes our signature coffee so loved all over the world. Savour the wonderfully rich and refreshing aroma of this medium-dark roast. Start a day right with the first sips of this classic, let the intense taste of Nescafe Classic awaken the mind and body to new opportunities as the rich aroma of this distinctive blend unfolds. Blended quality arabica and robusta beans and then roast them to medium-dark deliciousness to deliver the pleasurable experience.
• Net weight: 200g

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value: 1 teaspoon of Nescafe Instant Coffee with 150g of water and add creamer, skimmed milk or sugar if desired

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: After opening, firmly close back the lid and store in a cool, dry place

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

value.name: Nescafe Instant Soluble Coffee Jar - Classic

tags.name: DIY Natural Food Colourings - Brown or Black

product.description: Our experts have carefully crafted a quality coffee experience that has been a huge favourite for decades. Made by some of the world’s premier coffee experts, it is much more than a great tasting coffee. It is a superior, premium coffee that has raised the bar in coffee quality over the last 50 years.

metaData.Key Information: Nescafe carefully designed glass jar with its aroma-lock lid keeps your Nescafe Gold Blend full of flavour to the last drop. Arabica and a handful of robusta beans are blended together for a rich, yet smooth and rounded taste. The beans are golden roasted to reveal the gentle caramel flavours and bring out the distinctive, sophisticated aroma. Golden opportunities await as coffee lovers enjoy a special moment worth cherishing with the superior quality, flavour-rich and aromatic coffee.
metaData.Preparation: 1 teaspoon of Nescafe Instant Coffee with 150g of hot water and add creamer, skimmed milk or sugar if desired
metaData.Storage Information: After opening, close the lid and store in a cool, dry place

product.name: Nescafe Instant Soluble Coffee Jar - Gold

product.description: FairPrice Classic Instant Coffee is a blend of Arabrica & Robusta beans roasted to deliver a richer aroma, full bodied flavour. Perfect for those who like their coffee extra intense.

metaData.Key Information:
• Blend of Arabrica & Robusta
• Richer aroma
• Full bodied flavour
metaData.Preparation: Add 2g (1 teaspoon) of coffee into a cup, pour 150ml of hot water and stir until the coffee dissolved.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight.

product.name: Nescafe Instant Soluble Coffee Jar - Gold Intense

product.description: Moccona freeze-dried instant coffee is created using two of the world's finest beans: Arabica and the Robusta. The Arabica has a softer and sweeter taste with berry and fruit tones while Robusta bean has more caffeine and gives a deep rich flavor. Together they bring the magical blend and character you expect from the perfect cup of coffee. Every time you smell the aroma of Moccona, you'll be reminded of the great passion that drives us to create moments of pure indulgence just for you.

metaData.Key Information:
** Products with assorted designs and colours will be picked and given on a random basis
Dial up the roast and you develop the flavours. Moccona’s Classic Dark Roast says loud and clear ‘I’m earthy, warm and aromatic’. It’s a bold brew that brings to mind a cosy wood burning fire and mouth watering Moccona moments with no artificial colourings nor flavouring.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

The place where Arabica and Robusta beans meet for a rounded, balanced flavour is called Moccona Medium Roast. The happy medium, it's full bodied, richly aromatic and just right for an everyday coffee moment with no artificial colourings nor flavouring.
